title: Implement comprehensive adversarial smoke test harness

comments.author: anon-295fd0bb
comments.content: Implementing the smoke test harness from DESIGN-SMOKE-TEST-HARNESS.md (GH#350). Splitting into 11 parallel agents: 1) Harness foundation, 2) Issue CRUD+boundaries, 3) Issue org, 4) Comments+sessions+timer, 5) Data management, 6) Infrastructure commands, 7) Tooling commands, 8) Server API+WebSocket, 9) Coordination, 10) Adversarial, 11) TUI+proptest.

comments.author: anon-295fd0bb
comments.content: Existing cli_integration.rs has 186 tests covering most CLI commands. The new smoke harness will be a SEPARATE test binary (tests/smoke.rs + tests/smoke/ modules) focused on what's missing: server API, WebSocket, multi-agent coordination, adversarial/torture tests, corruption recovery, boundary attacks, and the tooling commands (cpitd, workflow, context, style, design-doc, mc). The new harness will NOT duplicate existing CLI tests.

comments.author: anon-295fd0bb
comments.content: Revised plan: Given 186 existing CLI tests, reduce from 11 agents to 8. Drop agents 2-4 (CLI Issue CRUD, Issue Org, Comments+Sessions) — already well covered. Keep: 1) Harness foundation + init edge cases, 2) CLI data management (import/export roundtrip, knowledge edge cases), 3) CLI infrastructure (config, sync, integrity, compact, prune), 4) CLI tooling (cpitd, workflow, context, style, design_doc, mc), 5) Server API + WebSocket, 6) Coordination (events, compaction, locks, push retry), 7) Adversarial (boundary, corruption, injection, concurrency), 8) TUI + proptest extensions.
